steps.title: Spot the procedural pattern
steps.content: The passage introduces the ebru process with “First” and “Next,” clearly signaling a step-by-step procedure. The blank must complete this sequence with a transition to the final step.

steps.title: Match to the transition pattern
steps.content: ”Finally” marks the culminating action of transferring the design—the natural third step after the setup and preparation stages. The other three signal opposition, consequence, or correction rather than advancing through a procedure. That matches choice D — D is correct.
